title: callistachys retusa
intro: Callistachys retusa, also known as the dragon's blood tree, is a small, deciduous tree native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Callistachys retusa include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and bark in hot water, or by using the resin to create a tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
